name: Halfway House Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince a clove of garlic and sauté it in a little butter until the butter is well flavored. Remove the garlic.
2. Add the meat to the butter and brown it well on all sides.
3. Pour in the rum, then place the meat and liquids in a kettle, adding enough water to cover the meat.
4. Add horseradish, bay leaf, peppercorns, salt, and sugar. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce the liquid by half and simmer until the meat is nearly done.
6. Add whole onions, carrots, and potatoes, and cook in the liquid until all vegetables are tender.
7. Remove the meat from the liquid. The remaining liquid can be thickened with a little flour and water mixed together to make gravy.
